items: Matt McLain homered 2 times in St. Louis's 5-3 win over Cincinnati.
Sebastián Rivero had 6 RBI as The Angels beat The Dodgers, 13-5.
Texas pitching combined to shut out Cleveland, 10-0.
The Athletics pitching combined to shut out Houston, 5-0.
San Francisco edged Chicago Cubs, 2-1, in 10 innings.
Taylor Walls, Victor Mesa Jr. combined for 3 stolen bases.
Detroit walked off Seattle, 5-4 — one of 2 one-run finishes across the league.
